summary: Completed testing of ETI Educom Admin Panel enhancements - Image Upload & JWT Auth features. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All tabs verified with image upload fields and security features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py is very large (3900+ lines) - consider splitting into separate route modules for maintainability
Admin login returns 200 with success=false for invalid credentials - consider returning 401 for security best practices (noted in previous iteration)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all tabs verified, image upload fields present, security features working)

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for reviews, events, partners, universities, and team members - all cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) JWT auth with bcrypt password hashing, 2) File upload endpoint at POST /api/upload, 3) Password change at POST /api/admin/change-password, 4) ImageUploadField component in Reviews, Events, Partners, Universities, Team tabs. Security tab shows Change Password form with login attempt logging.

admin_login_jwt.details: POST /api/admin/login with password admin123 returns JWT token, wrong password returns success=false

password_change.details: POST /api/admin/change-password requires auth, validates current password, updates password in DB

file_upload.details: POST /api/upload accepts images (jpg, png, gif, webp, svg, ico), rejects invalid types and files >5MB, returns URL at /api/uploads/

reviews_image_upload.details: Reviews tab has Student Photo field with ImageUploadField component (URL input + Upload button)

events_image_upload.details: Events tab has Event Cover Image and Gallery Images fields with ImageUploadField components

partners_logo_upload.details: Partners tab has Partner Logo field with ImageUploadField component

universities_logo_upload.details: Universities tab has University Logo field with ImageUploadField component

team_photo_upload.details: Team tab has Team Member Photo field with ImageUploadField component

security_tab.details: Security tab has Change Password form with Current Password, New Password fields and Change Password button. Shows login attempt logs.

security_features_verified.jwt_authentication: Working - tokens generated on login, validated on protected endpoints
security_features_verified.bcrypt_password_hashing: Working - passwords hashed with bcrypt, verified correctly
security_features_verified.password_change: Working - requires current password, updates hash in DB
security_features_verified.login_logging: Working - login attempts logged and displayed in Security tab
